scripts.config:cache: npm.cmd config set cache "./.npm-cache" --location=project && cd frontend && npm.cmd config set cache "../.npm-cache" --location=project && cd ../server && npm.cmd config set cache "../.npm-cache" --location=project && cd ..
scripts.install:all: npm.cmd run config:cache && npm.cmd run install:server && npm.cmd run install:frontend
scripts.dev: echo 请分别在两个终端运行: 终端1: npm.cmd run start:server   终端2: npm.cmd run start:frontend
scripts.start: echo 请分别在两个终端运行: 终端1: npm.cmd run start:server   终端2: npm.cmd run start:frontend
scripts.check:server: powershell -Command "try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3001/api/stats' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty StatusCode } catch { Write-Host 'Server not running on port 3001' }"
scripts.check:frontend: powershell -Command "try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5173' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty StatusCode } catch { Write-Host 'Frontend not running on port 5173' }"
